states.notFoundDescription: The screen you tried to open doesn't exist.

onboarding.title: Markdown Reviewer
onboarding.subtitle: Open a local repository to start reviewing Markdown pull requests.

list.heading: Open pull requests
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, number, author, or branch…
list.emptyAll: There are no open pull requests for this repository.
list.emptyFiltered: No pull requests match your search.
list.repoMissingDescription: We couldn't find a local path for {{owner}}/{{repo}}. Pick the folder again from the home screen.

invalidPrNumber.title: Invalid pull request
invalidPrNumber.description: "{{value}}" is not a valid PR number.

sidebar.title: Changes
sidebar.emptyAllNonMarkdown_one: This pull request changes {{count}} file, none of them Markdown.
sidebar.emptyAllNonMarkdown_other: This pull request changes {{count}} files, none of them Markdown.
sidebar.emptyTree: No files changed in this pull request.

preview.noFileSelected: Pick a Markdown file from the sidebar to start reading.
preview.unsupportedDescription: Markdown Reviewer renders Markdown files only.

preview.emptyHint: Pick a pull request and a Markdown file to start reviewing.

threads.title: Review threads
threads.subtitle: Comments attached to rendered Markdown ranges.
threads.empty: No threads yet — select text in the preview to start one.

notAGitRepo.title: Not a Git repository
notAGitRepo.description: {{path}} is not inside a Git working tree.
notAGitRepo.actionHint: Select a folder that contains a .git directory.

noGithubRemote.title: No GitHub remote
noGithubRemote.description: This repository doesn't have a GitHub origin remote.
noGithubRemote.actionHint: Add a GitHub remote with `git remote add origin …`.

missingTool.title: {{name}} is not installed
missingTool.description: Markdown Reviewer needs `{{name}}` on your PATH.
missingTool.actionHintGeneric: Install it from your package manager.

ghNotAuthenticated.title: GitHub CLI not authenticated
ghNotAuthenticated.description: `gh auth status` reports you're not logged in.
ghNotAuthenticated.actionHint: Run `gh auth login` in your terminal.

prNotFound.title: Pull request not found
prNotFound.description: PR #{{number}} does not exist on this repo.

fileNotFound.title: File not found
fileNotFound.actionHint: The file may have been deleted in this PR, or the ref isn't fetched locally.
